description_long: This is a hanging potted plant featuring broad, stylized green leaves with angular, geometric edges, reminiscent of a tropical species. The leaves are large, overlapping, and have a slightly glossy appearance with subtle color gradients from light to dark green. The plant is housed in a simple, round, ochre-colored pot that is suspended by three thin, tan ropes converging at a single point above. The pot itself is plain, with no visible decorative patterns or textures, and appears to be made of a lightweight material. The ropes are securely attached to the rim of the pot, allowing the plant to be hung from a ceiling or hook. No plant identification label or tag is visible on the pot or plant.
description: A hanging potted plant with large, angular green leaves in a plain ochre pot suspended by three tan ropes. The plant has a tropical look and the pot is undecorated.
description_view_0: The plant is seen from a side angle, showing the broad leaves draping over the edge of the ochre pot and the three supporting ropes.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front of the plant, with the leaves fanning out symmetrically and the ropes clearly visible above the pot.
description_view_2: The plant is viewed from another side, revealing the overlapping leaves and the way the ropes attach to the pot's rim.
description_view_3: A top-down view shows the full spread of the large, angular leaves and the central convergence of the supporting ropes.
